questions.q: Choose the correct sentence in the past continuous:
opts: I watch TV at 8 p.m. yesterday.
I was watching TV at 8 p.m. yesterday.
I am watching TV at 8 p.m. yesterday.
I watched TV at 8 p.m. now.
questions.exp: The correct sentence is: "I was watching TV at 8 p.m. yesterday"

questions.q: Choose the correct sentence in the past simple:
opts: She is going to school yesterday.
She was go to school yesterday.
questions.exp: The correct sentence is: "She went to school yesterday"

questions.q: Which sentence uses the correct order of adjectives?
opts: It is a cotton blue nice shirt.
It is a nice blue cotton shirt.
It is a blue cotton nice shirt.
It is a cotton nice blue shirt.
questions.exp: The correct sentence is: "It is a nice blue cotton shirt"

opts: I prefer tea over than coffee.
questions.exp: The correct sentence is: "I prefer tea to coffee"

questions.q: Which sentence expresses a personal opinion?
opts: I think healthy food is important.
questions.exp: The correct sentence is: "I think healthy food is important"

opts: You should try the grilled fish restaurant.
questions.exp: Correct answer: You should try the grilled fish restaurant

questions.q: Which word is related to healthy eating?
questions.exp: The correct word is: "vitamin"

opts: While I studied, my brother was listening to music.
While I was studying, my brother was listening to music.
While I studying, my brother listened to music.
While I was study, my brother was listening.
questions.exp: The correct sentence is: "While I was studying, my brother was listening to music"

opts: We have visited the museum last week.
We visited the museum last week.
We have visit the museum last week.
We visiting the museum last week.
questions.exp: The correct sentence is: "We visited the museum last week"

questions.q: Choose the correct use of the present perfect:
opts: She has finished her homework already.
She has finished her homework yesterday.
She finished already her homework now.
She has finish her homework already.
questions.exp: The correct sentence is: "She has finished her homework already"

opts: I have lived here since five years.
I have lived here for five years.
I lived here for five years ago.
I am living here since five years.
questions.exp: The correct sentence is: "I have lived here for five years"

questions.q: Choose the word closest in meaning to peace:
questions.exp: Correct answer: calm

questions.q: Which sentence is best for starting a conversation politely?
opts: May I ask you a few questions?
questions.exp: The correct sentence is: "May I ask you a few questions?"

the reader’s opinion about the book
questions.exp: Correct answer: the reader’s opinion about the book

opts: This building is more tall than that one.
This building is taller than that one.
This building is tallest than that one.
This building is as taller as that one.
questions.exp: The correct sentence is: "This building is taller than that one"

questions.q: A formal report should usually be:
questions.exp: Correct answer: clear, organized, and objective

opts: I am probably visit my cousin tomorrow.
I will probably visit my cousin tomorrow.
I probably visited my cousin tomorrow.
I was visiting my cousin tomorrow.
questions.exp: The correct sentence is: "I will probably visit my cousin tomorrow"

questions.q: Which sentence uses the present continuous for future meaning?
opts: I am meeting my teacher tomorrow.
I have met my teacher tomorrow.
questions.exp: The correct sentence is: "I am meeting my teacher tomorrow"

opts: The more you practise, the better you become.
The more you practise, the gooder you become.
The more you practise, the best you become.
The more you practise, the most good you become.
questions.exp: The correct sentence is: "The more you practise, the better you become"

questions.exp: Correct answer: explain steps clearly
